query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, d.id as driver_table_id, d.user_id, d.is_online, d.is_available FROM users u LEFT JOIN drivers d ON d.user_id = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Gosson%' OR u.name LIKE '%Fergus%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, d.id as driver_table_id, d.user_id, d.is_online, d.is_available FROM users u LEFT JOIN drivers d ON d.user_id = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Gosson%' OR u.name LIKE '%Fergus%';
